Author: JohnNaguib
Title: How Solution Architects Can Use Microsoft’s Azure Globe Experience to Design Smarter Architectures
EnhancedContent:
In today’s cloud-driven landscape, solution architects are expected to make decisions that balance performance, scalability, compliance, cost, and even sustainability. It’s no longer enough to simply choose the right services—you also need to choose the right **locations**.

[https://dellenny.com/how-solution-architects-can-use-microsofts-azure-globe-experience-to-design-smarter-cloud-architectures/](https://dellenny.com/how-solution-architects-can-use-microsofts-azure-globe-experience-to-design-smarter-cloud-architectures/)
